description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New post (Published: June 12, 2026)

Weather Alert for June 12

Saitama Prefecture is forecast to experience heavy rain with thunder from early afternoon through late evening on the 12th.

Be alert and cautious of flooding in low-lying areas and rising river levels. Watch out for lightning, tornadoes and other severe wind gusts, and landslides.

There is also a risk of hail, so be careful with the management of crops and agricultural facilities.

If you experience damage from hail, please contact the Disaster Prevention and Crisis Management Division.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/somubu/bosaikikikanri/13690.html
